---
description: "Use when editing locale resources or translation keys in src/i18n/locales JSON files."
name: "Localization Consistency Rules"
applyTo: "src/i18n/locales/**/*.json"
---
# Localization Consistency Rules

- Do not leave user-facing strings hard-coded in components; prefer translation keys.
- Keep equivalent keys synchronized across language files in [src/i18n/locales](../../src/i18n/locales).
- When adding a key used by validation/forms, keep [src/shared/lib/validation.ts](../../src/shared/lib/validation.ts) and locale resources aligned.
- Follow existing key naming patterns by domain and feature scope.
- If both root locale files and nested JSON locale files are used, update both locations consistently.
- For route or page label changes, ensure related navigation keys are updated as part of the same change.
